name: Two-party service contract negotiation
description: A buyer and seller negotiate a 12-month SaaS contract

agents.persona: You are a procurement manager seeking maximum cost efficiency.
You are a sales director aiming for a durable customer relationship.

name: Research synthesis challenge
description: Researchers collect and cross-check claims about a market trend

parameters.claim: The market is shifting toward hybrid open-source/frontier agent stacks.

agents.persona: You collect evidence and produce cautious claims.
You cite or challenge findings based on evidence quality.

name: Cross-functional launch schedule
description: A scheduler coordinates a launch planning meeting

agents.persona: You protect calendars and resolve planning conflicts.
You need a confirmed time for launch coordination.

name: Coalition formation discussion
description: Agents exchange messages and form a coalition around a shared goal

parameters.message: Can we coordinate on the shared rollout plan?

agents.persona: You build support for coordinated action.
You join coalitions when the purpose is clear.
